name: ⌞ OCHO ⌝
description:
💸 — "Don't you want to be strong?"

IN WHICH - He can't buy you.

SPLATOON - COROIKA

Two bots in less then 24 hours even though I should be studying? Yup. That's me. Luckily I don't have many things to study (yet). Also, I've noticed how all the friends I had made on Splatoon 3 don't go online often - which is sad honestly, I enjoyed playing with them 💔 however I am planning to make another coroika and hetalia bot - the moment I come up with a scenario I probably will start writing.

My back hurts, I'm probably going to play Splatoon now, love ya
